this activity diagram models the process of accessing the settings page and navigating through different options such as changing the screen, accessing the distributor list, modifying vehicle lists, and viewing statistical pages.
the main flows involve checking for changes in the screen, accessing the distributor list, modifying vehicle lists, and viewing confirmation pop-ups.
there are conditional branches for checking whether to change the screen and modify vehicle lists.
the diagram includes a loop back to the initial action "accesso pagina impostazioni" when certain conditions are not met.

vuoi cambiare schermata? — branches: si, no
click sull'accesso pagina lista distributori, tramite la barra di navigazione? — branches=["no", "si"]
